description_long: This armchair features a deep burgundy leather or faux leather upholstery with a luxurious, tufted diamond pattern on the high, rounded backrest. The seat is wide and generously padded, offering ample comfort, while the armrests are smoothly integrated into the curved sides, creating a seamless and enveloping silhouette. The chair stands on four short, tapered wooden legs stained to match the upholstery, providing stability and a touch of elegance. The surface finish is smooth and slightly glossy, reflecting light subtly and enhancing the rich color. The overall design is modern yet classic, suitable for upscale urban interiors, lounges, or stylish waiting areas. The visible stitching and button tufting add a refined, handcrafted detail to the piece.
description: A deep burgundy, tufted leather armchair with a high, rounded backrest and integrated armrests, standing on short, tapered wooden legs. The chair has a smooth, glossy finish and a luxurious, modern-classic design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, padded seat, high tufted backrest, and smoothly integrated armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the chair's deep seat, sloped backrest, and the gentle curve of the armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the smooth, unadorned back panel and the two rear tapered legs.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the continuous curve from the backrest to the armrest and seat.
